title: URAI Genesis Final Media Production Manifest
coreLine: You live. URAI remembers. You choose what becomes real.
claimBoundary: Poster frames and loopable SVG backgrounds are created in-repo as launch-safe final fallback visuals. Final video/audio files require external render tools and must not be claimed live until rendered, rights-cleared, wired, tested, deployed, and smoke-proven.
missingGeneratorTool: No production video renderer, provider-backed image/video model, DAW export, or TTS voice generation tool is available in this environment.
allowedPublicClaim: URAI Genesis onboarding uses cinematic preview poster frames, loopable SVG motion backgrounds, captions, and render-ready production prompts.

assets.title: A Life Is Scattered
assets.motionDirection: Slow drift inward; fragments begin to align around a quiet center.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for A Life Is Scattered: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #7dd3fc and #fef3c7, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: A life is not one thing.
assets.audioCue: Sparse piano pulses, distant cassette air, tiny glass ticks.
assets.voiceoverLine: A life is not one thing. It is moments. People. Places. Pain. Joy. Work. Love. Loss. Dreams. Almosts. Again-and-agains. But most of it gets scattered. Across apps. Across years. Across your body. Across the parts of you nobody sees.
assets.captionText: A life is not one thing. Most of it gets scattered.
assets.altText: A Life Is Scattered cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: URAI Appears
assets.motionDirection: Orb breathes softly; fragments settle into rings.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for URAI Appears: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #a5f3fc and #34d399, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: A living world for your life.
assets.audioCue: Warm low brass/synth bloom, one soft inhale, glass harmonic chime.
assets.voiceoverLine: URAI brings the pieces home. Not another feed. Not another dashboard. A living world for your life.
assets.captionText: Not another feed. A living world for your life.
assets.altText: URAI Appears cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: You Live
assets.motionDirection: World grows from footsteps; map lines remain soft and permission-bound.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for You Live: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #fbbf24 and #7dd3fc, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: You do not build the map.
assets.audioCue: Soft heartbeat percussion joins piano with airy textile movement.
assets.voiceoverLine: You do not have to build the map. You live. URAI keeps up with you. It notices moments. Connects patterns. Protects context. And helps your life become visible to you.
assets.captionText: You do not build the map. You live.
assets.altText: You Live cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Sky Layer / Life Map
assets.motionDirection: Stars pulse in sequence; threads draw lightly between clusters.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Sky Layer / Life Map: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #38bdf8 and #c4b5fd, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Celestial pads, soft arpeggios, and high-dome wind.
assets.voiceoverLine: Above you is your Life Map. Every star is a moment. Every cluster is a chapter. Every storm is a signal. Every thread is a relationship. Every path is a pattern.
assets.captionText: Every star is a moment. Every cluster is a chapter.
assets.altText: Sky Layer / Life Map cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Orb Speaks
assets.motionDirection: Orb glow opens like an aperture; selected star answers with a soft pulse.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Orb Speaks: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #bae6fd and #2dd4bf, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: But I also found what it became.
assets.audioCue: Close whisper of air, soft interface pulse, tiny sub-bass answer.
assets.voiceoverLine: I found the moment. But I also found what it became.
assets.captionText: I found the moment. But I also found what it became.
assets.altText: Orb Speaks cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Focus Image
assets.motionDirection: Star blooms into a glass card; privacy receipt slides in last.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Focus Image: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #facc15 and #fb7185, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: Focus reveals the meaning of a moment.
assets.audioCue: Muted shutter bloom, piano chord, breathy tape swell.
assets.voiceoverLine: Tap a star, and the moment comes into Focus. Not just what happened. What it meant.
assets.captionText: Focus reveals the meaning of a moment. The Night Everything Changed
assets.altText: Focus Image cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Replay Begins
assets.motionDirection: Camera pushes into the card; path becomes a soft tunnel of memory light.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Replay Begins: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #fb923c and #f0abfc, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Heartbeat percussion rises; reverse cymbal into warm impact.
assets.voiceoverLine: Enter the memory, and Focus becomes Replay. A moment becomes a scene. A scene becomes a film. A film becomes a world you can walk through.
assets.captionText: Replay preview A moment becomes a scene.
assets.altText: Replay Begins cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Ground Layer / AI Council
assets.motionDirection: Council labels orbit the Guardian boundary; no agent leaves the circle.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Ground Layer / AI Council: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #f59e0b and #22c55e, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Precise rhythmic pulse, intelligent machinery, human hand-drum ghost.
assets.voiceoverLine: Below the sky is the ground. This is where URAI's models work. A council of agents, each with a job. Some remember. Some protect. Some create. Some guide. Some translate. Some help you move. Not one assistant. A life system.
assets.altText: Ground Layer / AI Council cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Private Nudges
assets.motionDirection: Cards appear only after a consent glow; cards can dismiss themselves.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Private Nudges: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #14b8a6 and #fde68a, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: You usually crash after days like this. Drink water. Text your person. Do not make the big decision tonight.
You have circled this for 11 days. Want the first step?
This song, this place, and this person usually reconnect you.
assets.audioCue: Soft tap, gentle chime, no alert panic, no surveillance texture.
assets.voiceoverLine: URAI does not only replay your life. It helps you live it.
assets.captionText: You usually crash after days like this. Drink water. Text your person. Do not make the big decision tonight. You have circled this for 11 days. Want the first step?
assets.altText: Private Nudges cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Life Films
assets.motionDirection: Frames assemble into a ribbon, then stop at a gated proof marker.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Life Films: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #f97316 and #60a5fa, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Cinematic beat swells, then lands behind a gated proof tone.
assets.voiceoverLine: One memory can become a Replay. Many memories can become a Life Film. Not a slideshow. A cinematic map of becoming.
assets.captionText: Life Film preview A cinematic map of becoming.
assets.altText: Life Films cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Memory Music Videos
assets.motionDirection: Waveform glows with the lyric, then fades back into the Life Map.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Memory Music Videos: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #a78bfa and #f472b6, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: I was not lost. I was becoming.
assets.audioCue: Swelling cinematic beat, intimate vocal pad placeholder.
assets.voiceoverLine: Some memories become films. Some become music. Some become something you can finally feel without explaining.
assets.captionText: I was not lost. I was becoming.
assets.altText: Memory Music Videos cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Living Memories / Symbolic People
assets.motionDirection: Silhouettes remain abstract; consent boundary stays on screen.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Living Memories / Symbolic People: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #e0f2fe and #c084fc, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: User: You made it farther than you knew.
Younger self: Then why did it feel like I was losing?
Orb: Because you were surviving before you had language for it.
Symbolic. Consent-based. Not a replacement for real people.
assets.audioCue: Quiet breath pad, subtle room tone, no uncanny voice imitation.
assets.voiceoverLine: Some memories are places. Some are people. Some are conversations you still carry. URAI can create symbolic people and living memories: emotional mirrors to help you understand, remember, prepare, forgive, and heal.
assets.captionText: User: You made it farther than you knew. Younger self: Then why did it feel like I was losing?
assets.altText: Living Memories / Symbolic People cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: AR / VR / XR
assets.motionDirection: Three portals open, then lock behind a preview badge.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for AR / VR / XR: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #67e8f9 and #818cf8, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Spatial whoosh, soft sub bloom, airy portal shimmer.
assets.voiceoverLine: In AR, memories can live in your real space. In VR, memories become worlds. In XR, your outer world and inner world can finally speak.
assets.altText: AR / VR / XR cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Passport / Data Ownership
assets.motionDirection: Receipts stack into a protected Passport card.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Passport / Data Ownership: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #2dd4bf and #fef3c7, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Quiet trust chord, soft card movement, restrained confirmation tone.
assets.voiceoverLine: And none of this matters if it is not yours. Your memories. Your emotional map. Your Life Films. Your signals. Your permissions. Your data. Private by default. Shared only with permission. Licensed only with consent. If your life creates value, you should have a say in that value.
assets.altText: Passport / Data Ownership cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Global Emotional Map
assets.motionDirection: Signals glow only after permission markers appear.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Global Emotional Map: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #38bdf8 and #86efac, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
assets.audioCue: Wide choir-like pad, tiny hopeful pulses, no alarm language.
assets.voiceoverLine: With permission, human signal can help us understand loneliness, stress, recovery, belonging, grief, joy, and hope. Built for care. Not exploitation.
assets.altText: Global Emotional Map cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Accessibility / Legacy
assets.motionDirection: Caption ribbons and sound waves meet at a legacy star.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Accessibility / Legacy: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #fde68a and #93c5fd, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: Preserve what time tries to take.
assets.audioCue: Warm minimal motif, soft braille-like taps, family archive air.
assets.voiceoverLine: For people who cannot see it, URAI can speak it. For people who cannot hear it, URAI can show it. For people carrying trauma, URAI can soften the doorway. For families, it can preserve what time tries to take.
assets.altText: Accessibility / Legacy cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.

assets.title: Final Return Home
assets.motionDirection: Every layer collapses into the orb; final CTA appears after a calm pause.
assets.cameraDirection: 8-12 second cinematic shot for Final Return Home: composed as a premium memory-world trailer moment, with restrained motion and no fake private user data.
assets.lightingDirection: Volumetric Genesis lighting using #a5f3fc and #facc15, deep sky contrast, warm human highlights, and a soft trusted vignette.
uiOverlayText: Your life is a living world.
You live. URAI remembers. You choose what becomes real.
assets.audioCue: Full score resolves: piano, low brass, arpeggios, heartbeat, final breath.
assets.voiceoverLine: URAI is your home. Your sky. Your ground. Your orb. Your council. Your map. Your films. Your worlds. Your memories. Your data. Your future. You do not have to feed another app. Just live. You live. URAI remembers. You choose what becomes real.
assets.captionText: URAI Genesis. You live. URAI remembers. You choose what becomes real.
assets.altText: Final Return Home cinematic Genesis preview poster. Symbolic visual only; no private user media.
